title: Parkio Daily for April 27, 2026
teaser: Toy Story 5 merchandise drops ahead of June release. Parks operating normally with standard hours across all resorts.

bignews.title: Toy Story 5 Merchandise Wave Launches Today
bignews.body: Disney unveiled a major collection of Toy Story 5 products ahead of the film's June 19 theatrical release. New items include interactive talking figures from Mattel, collectible Funko POPs, LEGO playsets, and travel accessories from Away. The collection features classic characters like Woody, Buzz, and Jessie alongside newcomers Lilypad and Smarty Pants.

topstories.title: Interactive Toy Story Figures Talk to Each Other
topstories.body: Mattel's new Playscale Interactables line brings tech-enhanced play to Toy Story 5. Figures of Woody, Buzz Lightyear, Jessie, Lilypad, and Forky recognize each other and interact with character-specific phrases, reflecting the film's 'toy meet tech' theme.

topstories.title: LeapFrog Debuts Educational Lilypad Toy
topstories.body: The Explore & Learn Lilypad from LeapFrog lets kids send text messages to Toy Story characters using emojis and preset messages while learning letters, numbers, and problem-solving skills through interactive games.

topstories.title: Away Launches Toy Story Travel Collection
topstories.body: Away will release Toy Story 5-inspired luggage, backpacks, and accessories on June 9. The collection features designs based on Woody, Buzz Lightyear, Jessie, Aliens, and newcomer Lilypad, with products for both kids and adults.

topstories.title: Crocs Releasing Jessie-Inspired Boots
topstories.body: Crocs will launch Western-themed 'croots' inspired by Jessie's iconic look on June 16. The boots feature denim and cow print collars, red trim with white lacing, and four Jessie-themed Jibbitz charms.

icymi.title: Pandora Toy Story Collection Arrives May 21
icymi.body: Pandora's Toy Story collection launches May 21 with items including a Sheriff Star Bracelet featuring blue and brown leather with an embossed star charm inspired by Woody. The collection will be available online and in select retail locations.

icymi.title: POP MART Blind Box Series Coming May 1
icymi.body: POP MART will release Toy Story 5 blind box collectibles on May 1. Each figure features a toy box design with a button that reveals scenes from the movie when pressed.

spotlight.title: Your Daily Parks Reminder
spotlight.body: All Walt Disney World and Disneyland Resort parks are operating on regular schedules today. Check the official Disney app for current wait times and park hours before your visit.
